description: Next-session forecasts for all holdings and market indices. Generated before each trading session. Accuracy is tracked session-by-session to build a feedback loop.

next_session.dominant_variable: Profit-booking after +3.72% ceasefire rally. April 10 Islamabad talks are next binary event. TCS/INFY earnings this week.

scenarios.label: Earnings Optimism
scenarios.description: TCS/INFY results beat expectations; April 10 talks proceed without incident.
scenarios.market_tone: Continued rally. IT sector leads. Financials follow on NIM beats.

scenarios.label: Profit-Booking / Consolidation
scenarios.description: Post +3.72% rally profit-booking. Mixed earnings. April 10 talks neutral. FII flows unchanged.
scenarios.market_tone: Flat session. Consolidation healthy. DII buys dips. No fresh catalyst.

scenarios.label: Profit-Taking + Islamabad Risk
scenarios.description: Sell-the-news after ceasefire rally. April 10 Islamabad talks signal breakdown risk.
scenarios.market_tone: Gap-down open. Defense stocks give back some gains. FII selling resumes.

next_session.note: Apr 8 outcome: DEAL CONFIRMED. Nifty +3.72% to 23,984.85 (best day in months). Brent crashed to $93.85. April 9 is consolidation territory — rally is priced in.

index_forecasts.watch: Watch for stabilisation above $90. Below $88 = demand destruction fear.

Gold still elevated vs pre-conflict levels
April 10 talks could re-introduce risk premium

key_factors: Ceasefire removes acute fuel shock risk
holding_forecasts.watch: A002 INDIGO SELL trigger (Brent >$115) is now INACTIVE. Watch for April 10 outcome.

holding_forecasts.watch: A001 still OPEN. If deal scenario C → gap-up gives A001 sell window at ₹278-285. If escalation → do not sell, wait for recovery.

holding_forecasts.downside_trigger: Brent spikes to $118-120 → MRPL approaches target range ₹160-170 faster
holding_forecasts.watch: P002 thesis tracking — escalation scenario accelerates to target. Monitor daily.

₹33 buffer above P005 target (>₹430) — very safe

holding_forecasts.watch: P005 thesis very safe. Only review if closes below ₹445 (approaching ₹430 zone).

key_factors: Hormuz blockade = direct traffic volume impact
holding_forecasts.watch: A004: If Nifty closes below 22,200 → consider trimming 30% of ADANI PORT.

SETFGOLD slightly underperforming gold today (-0.88%) — tracking issue possible

holding_forecasts.upside_trigger: Iran escalation → defense stocks rally further. Approaching ₹1,000.
holding_forecasts.watch: Biggest winner today (+5.61%). Watch ₹1,000 breakout level. If holds, consider partial profit booking.

previous_sessions.notes: First session of FY27. No prior forecast was generated for this session.
Forecast SIDEWAYS_UP (+0.4%). Actual: Nifty +0.68%. Direction CORRECT. IT sector decoupled from geopolitical risk — HCLTECH +2.73%, INFY +2.54%, TCS +2.66%.
previous_sessions.error_analysis: Direction correct. Magnitude slightly underestimated (+0.68% vs +0.4% forecast). IT/USD decoupling was the key driver — now tracked as FORECAST_PAT001.

previous_sessions.notes: Forecast BINARY_VOLATILE (base -0.8%, extension scenario). Actual: Nifty +3.72% on CEASEFIRE DEAL. Direction WRONG — underweighted deal scenario (assigned 20% probability, it materialised at 100%). Brent crashed to $93.85 (-14.1%).
previous_sessions.error_analysis: Deal scenario materialised — the 20% probability outcome. Lesson (FORECAST_PAT003): For binary geopolitical forecasts, best-case outcomes tend to be underweighted. When deal/ceasefire materialises, regime flips entirely — not incrementally. Future forecasts must include explicit reversal trigger: 'If deal → +2-4% Nifty rally'.

session_accuracy_summary.notes: 2 sessions forecasted. 1 correct (Apr 7 SIDEWAYS_UP ✓), 1 wrong (Apr 8 underweighted deal scenario ✗). Patterns identified: FORECAST_PAT001 (IT/USD decoupling), FORECAST_PAT003 (geopolitical binary underweighting). Feedback loop active.
